name: Chocolate Microwave Bananas
recipeIngredient: 5 firm bananas, peeled and halved, cut crossways
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert skewers in end cuts of bananas. Freeze at least 2 hours.
2. Just before serving, place chips and shortening in a small mixing bowl.
3. Microwave on Medium for 2 to 4 minutes or until most of the chips are shiny and soft. Blend well.
4. Dip frozen bananas in chocolate to coat, or spoon chocolate over bananas, allowing excess to drip off.
5. Serve immediately.
